description:
Ensure Polish (pl) and English (en) Data Structures are Identical

Verify and align the data structures between Polish and English language configurations to maintain consistency across both language versions.

Requirements:
- Compare the structure of pl and en data objects/files (keys, nesting levels, data types)
- Identify any missing keys, extra keys, or structural differences between the two
- Add any missing keys from one language to the other with appropriate placeholder values
- Ensure nested object hierarchies match exactly between pl and en
- Verify array structures contain the same number of elements and types
- Remove any language-specific keys that don't exist in both versions (or document why they should remain)
- Validate that both structures can be parsed by the same code without conditional logic
- Run tests or validation to confirm structural parity

Edge cases to consider:
- Keys that exist in one language but not the other
- Different data types for the same key (string vs object, etc.)
- Inconsistent nesting depth
- Arrays with mismatched lengths
- Extra whitespace or formatting differences that might hide structural issues
